name: French Toast- Better Homes and Gardens New Cookbook
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and salt until well combined.
2. Dip each slice of day-old bread into the egg-milk mixture, coating both sides lightly.
3. Heat a small amount of fat in a frying pan over medium heat. Add 4-6 coated bread slices at a time.
4. Fry the bread slices until golden brown on both sides.
5. Serve hot with maple-flavored syrup, confectioners' sugar, or tart jelly, if desired.
Notes: From BETTER HOMES AND GARDENS NEW COOK BOOK, 1968, Meredith Corp., New York, SBN 696-00010-5, page 46.
